glosses.ja: いらいらさせる; 困らせる

translations.en: You’ve been annoying me since this morning.
translations.es: Me estás molestando desde esta mañana.
translations.de: Du gehst mir seit heute Morgen auf die Nerven.
translations.it: Mi stai dando fastidio da stamattina.
translations.ko: 아침부터 계속 나를 귀찮게 하고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 你从今天早上就一直烦我。
translations.yue: 你由今朝開始就一直煩我。
translations.ru: Ты меня раздражаешь с самого утра.
translations.pt: Você está me irritando desde hoje de manhã.
translations.vi: Bạn làm tôi bực mình từ sáng đến giờ.
translations.uk: Ти дратуєш мене з самого ранку.
translations.hi: तुम सुबह से मुझे परेशान कर रहे हो.
translations.nb: Du har irritert meg siden i morges.
translations.sv: Du har stört mig sedan i morse.
translations.da: Du har irriteret mig siden i morges.
translations.ja: 朝からずっとあなたに悩まされている。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb.
Finite verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive verb ‘emmerder’ with attached clitic direct object ‘me’ (elided to m’ before vowel). Vulgar register meaning ‘to annoy/piss off’.
Preposition meaning ‘since’; introduces a time expression.
Demonstrative determiner; modifies ‘matin’ (masculine singular).
Common noun; complement of the preposition ‘depuis’.

translations.en: It annoys me to wait again.
translations.es: Me molesta tener que esperar otra vez.
translations.de: Es nervt mich, wieder warten zu müssen.
translations.it: Mi dà fastidio dover aspettare di nuovo.
translations.ru: Меня бесит, что надо снова ждать.
translations.pt: Me irrita ter que esperar de novo.
translations.he: מעצבן אותי שאני צריך לחכות שוב.
translations.tr: Yine beklemek zorunda kalmak sinirimi bozuyor.
translations.vi: Tôi bực mình vì lại phải chờ.
translations.ar: يزعجني أن عليّ الانتظار مرة أخرى.
translations.nl: Het irriteert me dat ik weer moet wachten.
translations.uk: Мене дратує, що знову треба чекати.
translations.hi: मुझे फिर से इंतज़ार करना पड़ रहा है, यह मुझे परेशान करता है.
translations.pl: Wkurza mnie, że znowu muszę czekać.
translations.el: Με νευριάζει που πρέπει να περιμένω πάλι.
translations.nb: Det irriterer meg at jeg må vente igjen.
translations.id: Aku kesal karena harus menunggu lagi.
translations.sv: Det irriterar mig att jag måste vänta igen.
translations.ro: Mă enervează că trebuie să aștept din nou.
translations.cs: Štve mě, že musím zase čekat.
translations.da: Det irriterer mig, at jeg skal vente igen.
translations.fi: Minua ärsyttää, että joudun taas odottamaan.
translations.ja: また待たなきゃいけないのがイライラする。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun (colloquial ‘cela’); subject of the verb.
Finite verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive ‘emmerder’ with attached clitic direct object ‘me’ (m’).
Prepositional infinitive (‘de’ + infinitive ‘attendre’); complements the verb, expressing the action that causes annoyance.
Adverb meaning ‘still/again’; modifies the infinitive or the clause, adding aspect/iteration.

sentences.target: Arrête de m'emmerder, s'il te plaît.

translations.fr: Arrête de m'emmerder, s'il te plaît.
translations.de: Hör bitte auf, mich zu nerven.
translations.it: Smettila di darmi fastidio, per favore.
translations.ko: 제발 나 좀 그만 귀찮게 해.
translations.pt: Por favor, para de me incomodar.
translations.vi: Làm ơn đừng làm phiền tôi nữa.
translations.hi: कृपया मुझे परेशान करना बंद करो.
translations.el: Σταμάτα να με ενοχλείς, σε παρακαλώ.
translations.nb: Vær så snill, slutt å plage meg.
translations.ro: Te rog, încetează să mă deranjezi.
translations.da: Stop venligst med at irritere mig.
translations.ja: お願いだから、もう邪魔しないで。

tokens.explanation: Imperative form, 2nd person singular of ‘arrêter’; directive addressed to the addressee.
Preposition ‘de’; required by ‘arrêter de + infinitif’ to introduce the verb complement.
Infinitive of ‘emmerder’ with attached clitic direct object ‘me’ (m’); complements ‘arrête’.
Contraction of subordinating conjunction ‘si’ (‘if’) and subject pronoun ‘il’; part of the fixed polite expression ‘s’il te plaît’.
Clitic object pronoun, 2nd person singular; indirect object of ‘plaît’ in ‘plaire à qqn’.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; in the set phrase ‘s’il te plaît’ (‘please’).

sentences.target: Ils nous emmerdent avec leurs remarques.

translations.fr: Ils nous emmerdent avec leurs remarques.
translations.en: They’re bugging us with their comments.
translations.es: Nos están fastidiando con sus comentarios.
translations.de: Sie nerven uns mit ihren Bemerkungen.
translations.it: Ci infastidiscono con i loro commenti.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们的评论让我们很烦。
translations.yue: 佢哋啲說話令我哋好煩。
translations.pt: Eles nos irritam com seus comentários.
translations.he: הם מעצבנים אותנו עם ההערות שלהם.
translations.vi: Họ làm chúng tôi khó chịu với những lời nhận xét của họ.
translations.nl: Ze irriteren ons met hun opmerkingen.
translations.hi: वे अपनी टिप्पणियों से हमें परेशान कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Μας ενοχλούν με τα σχόλιά τους.
translations.nb: De irriterer oss med kommentarene sine.
translations.id: Mereka membuat kami kesal dengan komentar mereka.
translations.sv: De irriterar oss med sina kommentarer.
translations.da: De irriterer os med deres kommentarer.
translations.ja: 彼らの発言が私たちをイライラさせる。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural; subject of the verb.
Clitic object pronoun, 1st person plural; direct object of ‘emmerdent’.
Finite verb in present indicative, 3rd person plural; transitive ‘emmerder’ taking ‘nous’ as object. Vulgar register.
Preposition introducing an instrumental/comitative phrase.
Possessive determiner, agrees in number with the noun (‘remarques’, plural).
Common noun, plural; complement of the preposition ‘avec’, modified by the determiner ‘leurs’.
